objective: Make the LifeMax public app more credible by adding a browser-local import/restore workflow, two-step local reset confirmation, and proof that local export, reset, restore, and refresh persistence work without backend claims.
riskClass: Q2 app/frontend product-functionality upgrade with Q3 production deployment already approved by PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_APPROVED=true promote
completion_blocker: The public browser-local app slice is verified locally, but the separate LifeMax lab/shared-context boot packet remains red, so this cannot be claimed as full LifeMax daily usability.

changes.summary: Adds validated LifeMax local export/import parsing and normalized restore output.
Adds Profile import/restore UI, invalid JSON status, two-step reset confirmation, and updated local-only Privacy copy.
Adds restrained import and reset-confirmation styling for a credible local data-control surface.
Covers valid local export import, raw local state import, and malformed JSON rejection.
Covers export preview capture, invalid import error, cancelable reset confirmation, confirmed reset, import restore, refresh persistence, and restored export visibility.

functional_flows_proven: Profile import button stays disabled until local JSON is pasted.
Invalid pasted JSON shows an honest parse error.
Reset local demo stages a confirmation panel instead of clearing immediately.
Cancel reset preserves existing local state.
Confirm reset clears only this browser's demo state.
A prior local export can be pasted back into Profile and restored.
Restored capture, memory, experiment, and history summary state persists after refresh.
truth_boundaries_preserved: Import, export, and reset are browser-local only.
No backend records, WHOOP data, account sync, hosted AI, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, or Postgres writes are touched or claimed.
Import accepts only LifeMax local demo export/state schemas and normalizes legacy records before storing.

checks.details: First run failed on react/no-unescaped-entities in new import helper copy; copy was repaired and lint reran clean.
First run failed because the old Profile copy assertion did not include import; test was updated to the new contract and reran with 2 Playwright tests passing.
No matches for common token/secret patterns.

proved: Validate and import is disabled before JSON input
Invalid JSON shows parse error status

loop_evidence.result: Rendered Profile showed export and immediate reset, but no local restore/import path; scout independently ranked import/restore as the top visible gap.
Added validated local import/restore and two-step reset confirmation without adding packages or backend claims.

defects_found: Lint failed on unescaped apostrophe in new helper copy.
Mobile Playwright proof still asserted the old export/reset copy after the import copy changed.
repairs_made: Reworded helper copy to avoid JSX escape issue.
Updated the mobile proof assertion to the new export/import/reset contract.

residual_risks: This remains browser-local demo functionality only.
No real backend, WHOOP, accounts, hosted AI, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, or Postgres integration was connected or verified.
Lab boot/preflight remains red and blocks full LifeMax daily-usability completion.
Vercel deployment and independent verification are still pending for this proof packet at creation time.
next_exact_action: Run quality gate for this packet, commit/push the feature, deploy production under the existing approval, smoke the deployed import/restore flow, then run independent verification before checkpointing.
